input.description: Scale to 10 workers for Phase 2 (2x load)

input.command: kubectl get deployment spark-worker -n spark-streaming -o jsonpath='{.spec.replicas}' && echo "" && kubectl get pods -n spark-streaming | grep spark-worker | wc -l 2>&1

To wait for a command you started, use run_in_background: true. Do not chain shorter sleeps to work around this block.

input.command: until [ "$(kubectl get pods -n spark-streaming --field-selector=status.phase=Running --no-headers 2>/dev/null | grep spark-worker | wc -l)" -eq 5 ]; do sleep 5; done && kubectl get pods -n spark-streaming 2>&1
input.description: Wait until exactly 5 spark-worker pods are running

description: Wait until exactly 5 spark-worker pods are running
